A Letter For You 💌
From the heart 💝

Not quite! 😅 Think... ✨

Sooo heyy hellloo my little girl 🥺🥺 kesi ho tum sabse pehleeee... Happppppyyyyy vala birthday meri jannnn-e-jahan 🥺🦄❤️ Happiest birthday meri mithu — Happy 22nd bdy meri motoo buggu! 🎂

We were literally 17 jad mile si yaar — literally bro time dekh kive niklya, pta hi nhi chla baby 🥺 But it is like reallllllllyyy really good with you motuu seth ji 🥺 I feel blessed to have you — tu meri shaitan kiddo a, tu meri 😭🦄🥺

But jo mrzi a yaar dekh mere putt — appn jina narzi ladiye, jhagdiye — I don't wanna go and I'll not go anywhere, smjhe tu baby 🥺🥺 Bs mai na jau, na jan dau trnu, gendu baby 🥺🥺

Baki its like so bestest time with you we have ever spent 💞 Oh our meet at your bdy — jad k holded your hands — it's like so pyara pyara vibes 🥺🥺💞

Jo mai harktan krda ohde lai — I'm sorry baby, literally sorry mere buggu baby 🥺 But yaar jo v tuc mere lai krde o — ehne efforts — none do this bro — literally appreciate krda baby. I really really love you meri rass malai 💞🥺

Meri ladli a tu baby — best friend to leke meri wife and so on — sab kuch a tu genda 💕 I literally love you. Ik baby I don't express much but love you so much baby tu 🥺 Ba mere nal rahi — appn sab nu piche chd dena baby 🥺

Baki sorry v a mere behaviour kr ke — love you v a for staying with me, bhrosa rakhn lai sab and all 🥺 I'll be always with you baby, always — jive chand nal tarre rehnde ne, suraj nal agg rehndi a, samundr ch pani a — ove hi mai tere nal rehna smjhi tu meri mottoo 🥺

I do have allot of plans for our future my baby girl — and ofcourse I'll implement those plans with you only 💕 Tu mera chan makhan a, meri sohni laddo — ik mai bhorda but I promise bc agli vaar tenu koi v shikayat da moka nhi miluga, kise v type di koi v shikayat nhi — thik a na motuuu kudiye 🥺

I am always with you my baby girl 💕 I love you like you are my child. I love you like you are my bffff. I love you like you are my girl. I love you like you are my mom. I love you — bs. I love being with you bro 💞

Menu teri presence boht boht psnd a yaar — you know what, mai literally boht dukhi a yaar, pta kyu? Coz menu moka ni milda tere nal rehn da, time spend krn da — college vale, office vale, gharde — are so lucky to have you bro. I am lucky to have you ik — but I want to be with you bro, I want to be with you 🥺🥺

"Tere saath chalna hi meri manzil ban gaya hai,
Tera naam hi ab mera har kal ban gaya hai.
Na daulat chahiye, na shohrat ka junoon,
Bas ek khwahish hai — zindagi bhar tera saath ho, bas itna sukoon."
🥺🥺🐼 I am so much into you — bs yaar I can't even explain. You are my girl, my baby — meri choti bachi a tu. Mai nhi dekh sakda tenu udas, pareshan, moti kudiye 🥺🥺 Tu meri a te sirf meri hi a 💕

Tenu tere janam din diya boht boht saari mubarakaan mere puttrr 🐼💚💞 Mai uncle ji nu v message krunga — ke mai tere nal a hamehsa. Mai ohna da putt hun — mera putt tu hamesha rahugee. Mai chahe marda marja but tera sath kade nhi chdungaa smjhi meri pandeee kudiye 🐼💚

Tere nal boht saari different different chizaan try krniya ne mai motuu — different food, different clothes, different dances, different sab kuch — but the same chiz I want is you, only you my girl 💞 Everywhere I want you — only you my girl. Hamesha tu chaidi a menu, mere nal — chahe hove dukh te chahe hove sukh 🥺

Sukh di mai guarantee ni lenda — te dukh ch mai tera sath chdna ni a veere 💕 Menu pta bro mai boht saari galtiyan kitiyan — kade kuch bhori, kade kuch bhori — hna har saal bhor dina 😅 But I promise — mai eh ni kehnda ki bhoru nhi — but I promise ke mai same galti dubara nhi krunga, meri mithoo, smjhi tu meri janee 🐼💚

Tera oh shaitani hassa uff bai — mai ki bolaa! Bada zyada msta bai — oh dil a janda mera oh shaitani hassa dekh ke, bai mozza a jata hai motiyeee 🥺😭 Yaar sun — cutu a yaar tu, my cutu lady 💕 I feel literally bad yaar bc mai salla eve hi hurt krda rehnda — tuc mere lai ehna sab krde o — bai mai yaar boht boht maffi mangda yaar tere to, meri laddooo meri motuuuu 🥺🥺🥺🦄🦄

Jasii, meri pandeee, meri jazzz, meri tarbuj, meri motiii, meri oliee olivia... ajj main poore dil naal, bina kise ego de, bina kise excuse de, sirf sach bolna chohna 💘🥺 Shayad main hamesha perfect words nahi labh ponda, shayad main har vaar sahi tareeke naal express nahi karda — par ajj jo likh reha oh mere dillo a bai 🥺🥺

Sab ton pehla, main eh manna chohna ke main galtiyan karda 🥺 Kai vaar bina soche bol dinaa. Kai vaar apne mood nu control nahi krda. Kai vaar tainu samjhan di jagah apna point prove karan lag jana 🥺 Te sab ton vaddi gall — kai vaar meri wajah naal tainu hurt hunda. Eh gall main ignore nahi kar sakda. But mai hamesha make sure krunga ke tenu hurt na hove — meri koi v gal, kuch v jo v mai kita ya kra 💕

Par Jasiii — meri galtiyan meri feelings nu define nahi kardiyan. Main imperfect a, par mera pyaar tere layi fake nahi hai. Main sachi tere naal rehna chohna. Main tere naal future imagine karda. Main sochda ke jad life thodi stable hoju, jad responsibilities vadd jaan, jad pressure vadhuga — main kede insaan de kol khada hona chahunga? Te har vaar answer tu hi hundi a baby 🥺💘

Pandeee — tu meri life ch sirf ikk insaan nahi. Tu meri emotional space a 🥺 Jad din kharab hove, main tere baare soch ke calm ho jana. Jad kuch achieve karaan, sab ton pehla share karan da mann tere naal hunda. Jad fail ho jaan — sab ton pehla jisdi yaad aundi hai — oh vi tu hi hundi a. Eh sirf attraction nahi. Eh attachment vi nahi. Eh uss level da pyaar hai jithe main tenu apni life da permanent hissa dekhda veere 🥺🥺💘

Jazzz — main janda trust build karna easy nahi hunda. Sirf "I love you" kehna kaafi nahi hunda. Pyaar consistency mangda hai 💞 Respect mangda hai. Emotional maturity mangda hai. Te main har din ehi sikh reha. Main sochda ke main hor calm kiven reh sakda si, main hor patiently kiven sun sakda si, main apni tone better kiven rakh sakda si 🥺🥺 Shayad main overnight perfect nahi ban sakda — par main efforts krne nhi chdunga baby girl 😭😭😭

Tarbuj — jad tu hassdi hai na, mera din automatically better ho janda hai 🥺 Teri hasi fake nahi hundi — oh pure hundi hai. Te mainu eh darr lagda ke kite meri stupidity uss hasi nu dull na kar deve. Main nahi chohnda ke tu apne emotions suppress kare sirf is karke ke main handle nahi kar pa reha. Main grow karna chohna, taaki tu apne real self ch mere naal comfortable feel kare 🥺🥺🥺

Motiii — tu shayad kade kade apne aap nu criticize kardi hove, par meri nazar ch tu enough ton vi zyada 🥺 Tu caring. Tu loyal. Tu emotionally strong a — chahe kade ro vi pene a. Te mainu pata hai ke je tu kisi de naal khadi ho jaave, tu pure dil naal khadi rehndi hai. Eh quality rare hundi a veere 🥺🥺 Main lucky a bai ke tu mere naal a 💕

Oliee olivia — main tenu sirf ese din layi nahi chohnda 🥺 Main tenu us dina layi vi chohna jad appn ladange, jad misunderstandings hon, jad stress houga. Main fight jeetna nahi — relationship jitana chohna veere 🥺🥺🥺 Je main galat a tan main sunna chohna. Je tu galat hove, main calmly samjhauna chohna. Par main kade vi eh nahi chohnda ke assi ego karke door ho jaiye 🥺💞

Cuteee pieee — mainu pata ke kade kade tu sochdi houngi — sahaj same mistake phir kyon repeat karda rehnda? 🥺😭 Te bai tbh main vi apne aap nu eh sawaal puchda. Shayad habits change hon ch time lagda. Shayad emotional reactions control karan ch practice lagdi a. Par main conscious. Main aware. Main careless nahi a yaar. Har vaar jad kuch galat hunda, mainu farak painda veere — bohot painda 😭🥺💞

Main tere naal simple life imagine karda 🥺 Random drives. Late night gallan. Chhoti chhoti celebrations. Silent moments jithe sirf haath fad ke baithna hi enough hove. Main imagine karda ke jad assi future ch kise problem nu face krange — I want ke appn nal beh ke sort kriye, na ke ik duje ton bhajiye vroo 🥺🥺

Tu meri weakness nahi — tu meri strength ban sakdi hai je main apne aap nu sahi direction ch improve karaan. Main chohna e jad vi tu mere baare soche — tenu doubt na hove. Tenu clarity hove. Tenu confidence hove ke — eh banda imperfect hai, par eh mera hai te eh laduga mere lai 🥺🥺🥺

Jasjeet — je kade vi meri karke tere dil ch thoda vi doubt aya hove mere pyaar baare — main ajj oh doubt khatam karna chohna veere 🥺 Main tenu choose karda. Roz. Har mood ch. Har phase ch. Har situation ch. Main tenu sirf feelings ch nahi — decision ch vi choose karda.

Main hamesha sahi nahi hovaanga. Par main hamesha try krunga. Main hamesha tere nal communicate kra. Main hamesha wapas aunga. Kyunki main tere naal rehna veere 🥺🥺🥺

I love you, pandeee. Hamesha. Sirf ajj nahi. Har kal. 💘🐼

— Yours forever, always 💖

It's Your
Birthday Month! 🎊
February 💕 Your Month Always

Okay okay, the day may have gone by... 🙈

But baby girl — February is YOUR month! 🌸

Every single day of this month is a celebration of YOU — the most beautiful, cuteeeeeee, sohni girl in my whole world 🌍💕

Koi gal nahi — main har roz tenu wish karta, birthday ho ya na ho 💝

Happy Birthday Month, my princess! 🎈👑

So much loveeee always always always 💖💖💖

Meri sohni kudiye 🥰
Main hamehsa tera naal rahunga — forever 💝
Tu mera putt a, meri motu girl, meri everything 🌸

Happy 22nd — this month, always 🎂

— Yours Forever 💝 —
